name: Motomova Inc
business: We are a US exploration stage Company engaged in the acquisition, exploration and production, if warranted, development of prospective oil and gas properties. The Company currently has lease holdings on the North Slope of Alaska and oil and gas production in Oklahoma.

exposures.sentence: We are a US exploration stage Company engaged in the acquisition, exploration and production, if warranted, development of prospective oil and gas properties.

catalysts.event: Continue drilling test wells on Oklahoma oil and gas leases
catalysts.sentence: Our plan of operation for 2011 is to continue drilling test wells on our Oklahoma oil and gas leases.
